exceptions.reason: JupyterHub manages rootless Podman workloads through the account socket and must map their users.
mitigations: The service runs under a dedicated rootless host account.
Only the dedicated account Podman socket is mounted.

exceptions.reason: JupyterHub uses the rootless Podman API to create and stop per-user notebook workloads.
mitigations: The socket belongs to a dedicated unprivileged host account.
The service is isolated on dedicated networks.
